description: Returns a paginated list of users belonging to a specific country.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response.

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return.

output.description: Paginated list of lite user profiles for users in the specified country.

fields.items: array — list of getUserLite-shaped user objects
fields.nextCursor: string|null — cursor for the next page, null when no more pages

notes: Each item in items has the same shape as the response from user.getUserLite.
